# SubDL

Subtitle downloader backed by [SubDL](https://subdl.com). When a download succeeds it
searches for subtitles in the configured languages, picks the best match per language,
and writes the extracted `.srt` next to the media file.

The VFS exposes these as `{name}.{lang}.srt` siblings of the media file, which is the
layout Plex, Emby, and Jellyfin all pick up automatically — no separate subtitle agent
needed. Languages are a comma-separated list and default to `en`.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Services

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.media-item.download.success`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__SUBDL__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `apikey` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__SUBDL__apikey` | secret | Yes | — | — |
| `languages` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__SUBDL__languages` | text | No | `en` | Comma-separated list of subtitle languages to download (e.g. en, es). |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
